examples: When he tells stories, he narrates vividly and humourously, making witty remarks. Every one likes to listen.
With no angry look, Mark Twain humourously said :" The report of my death is true, but they brought forward the date."
Philip said humourously that it is not necessarily a bad thing to have these people as neighbours. If they break the law, it is convenient for them to come to the courthouse.
